  "title": "Human Resources Executive",
  "description": "Nordic Hotels - With beautiful rooms and suites, we offer peaceful and pleasant surroundings for both business and leisure travelers.

Nordic Hotel combines distinctive modern Scandinavian design with exquisite service and comfort. Our prime objective is to provide our guests with a desirable and comfortable environment away from home. Simply put: We want to be the best hotels in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Human Resources Executive

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja
Job type: Full time

Requirements


	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications&nbsp;
	Human Resource background required
	Hospitality Industry experience required
	Learning &amp; Development or Departmental Trainer background is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter CV to:&nbsp;job@thenordicabuja.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Human Resources Executive Job at Nordic Hotels




        
    

        
        Nordic Hotels - With beautiful rooms and suites, we offer peaceful and pleasant surroundings for both business and leisure travelers.

Nordic Hotel combines distinctive modern Scandinavian design with exquisite service and comfort. Our prime objective is to provide our guests with a desirable and comfortable environment away from home. Simply put: We want to be the best hotels in Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Human Resources Executive

Job Location: Abuja
Job type: Full time

Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Candidates should possess relevant qualifications 
	Human Resource background required
	Hospitality Industry experience required
	Learning & Development or Departmental Trainer background is an added advantage.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Admin Officer",
  "description": "TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the Oil &amp; Gas sector, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Admin &amp; Accounts Officer, you will be responsible for supporting the company&rsquo;s administrative and financial operations. You will manage daily operational reports, follow up with clients, oversee staff coordination, and support customer engagement efforts to ensure smooth business operations.


Responsibilities


	Follow up with clients on payments, inquiries, and service delivery updates
	Manage administrative processes and office operations
	Coordinate staff activities and monitor task completion
	Assist in maintaining accurate financial and operational records
	Support customer engagement and help bring new customers through online platforms


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or HND in Accounting, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in administrative
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Basic accounting knowledge and experience with financial reporting
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, especially Excel.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-18",

Admin Officer Job at TeamAce Limited




        
    

        
        TeamAce Limited - Our client, a reputable organization in the Oil & Gas sector, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Admin Officer
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	As the Admin & Accounts Officer, you will be responsible for supporting the company’s administrative and financial operations. You will manage daily operational reports, follow up with clients, oversee staff coordination, and support customer engagement efforts to ensure smooth business operations.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Follow up with clients on payments, inquiries, and service delivery updates
	Manage administrative processes and office operations
	Coordinate staff activities and monitor task completion
	Assist in maintaining accurate financial and operational records
	Support customer engagement and help bring new customers through online platforms


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree or HND in Accounting, Business Administration, or related field
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in administrative
	Strong organizational and time management skills
	Basic accounting knowledge and experience with financial reporting
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office tools, especially Excel.


Salary
N200,000 - N250,000 per month.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Supply Chain and Logistics Officer",
  "description": "The National Agency for Science and Engineering Infrastructure (NASENI) was established in 1992 by the Federal Government after the recommendations of the White Paper Committee on the 1991 Report of a 150 member National Committee on Engineering Infrastructure comprising Scientists, Engineers, Administrators, Federal and State Civil Servants, Economists, Lawyers, Bankers and Industrialists.

The mandate of NASENI is specifically in the area of Capital goods, research, production and reverse engineering. NASENI, by its mandate and scope of operation is the Nigerian only purpose built Agency designed to conduct developmental work in the areas of manufacturing and as such, it is capable of coordinating the proliferation of technologies developed either within or outside of its Centers including patents obtained. Technologies developed in the areas of spares, components and systems engineering are to be transferred to Entrepreneurs for the production of goods and services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Supply Chain and Logistics Officer

Job Locations:&nbsp;Benue, Maiduguri - Borno, Enugu, Kano, Lagos
Job type: Full time

Job Description


	The role requires four to seven years of experience in supply chain management, logistics or procurement.
	Applicants should have a Degree in Supply Chain Management, Business or a related field, alongside experience in warehousing, distributor logistics and supply chain software systems.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter &amp; CV to:&nbsp;nasenipowerstove@naseni.gov.ng&nbsp;using &quot;Application for [Job Title] &ndash; [Preferred Location]&quot; as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-04-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "National Agency for Science and Engineering Infrastructure (NASENI)"
    
  },
  "jobLocation": {
    "@type": "Place",
    "address": {
      "@type": "PostalAddress",
       "postalCode": ". ",
       "addressRegion": ". ",
       "streetAddress": ". ",
      "addressLocality": "Benue, Enugu, Kano, Lagos",
      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },
  "identifier": {
    "@type": "PropertyValue",
    "name": "",
    "value": "195934"
  },
  "baseSalary": {
    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

    }
  }
}



Supply Chain and Logistics Officer Job at National Agency for Science and Engineering Infrastructure (NASENI)




        
    

        
        The National Agency for Science and Engineering Infrastructure (NASENI) was established in 1992 by the Federal Government after the recommendations of the White Paper Committee on the 1991 Report of a 150 member National Committee on Engineering Infrastructure comprising Scientists, Engineers, Administrators, Federal and State Civil Servants, Economists, Lawyers, Bankers and Industrialists.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



The mandate of NASENI is specifically in the area of Capital goods, research, production and reverse engineering. NASENI, by its mandate and scope of operation is the Nigerian only purpose built Agency designed to conduct developmental work in the areas of manufacturing and as such, it is capable of coordinating the proliferation of technologies developed either within or outside of its Centers including patents obtained. Technologies developed in the areas of spares, components and systems engineering are to be transferred to Entrepreneurs for the production of goods and services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Supply Chain and Logistics Officer

Job Locations: Benue, Maiduguri - Borno, Enugu, Kano, Lagos
Job type: Full time

Job Description


	The role requires four to seven years of experience in supply chain management, logistics or procurement.
	Applicants should have a Degree in Supply Chain Management, Business or a related field, alongside experience in warehousing, distributor logistics and supply chain software systems.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Cover Letter & CV to: [email protected] using "Application for [Job Title] – [Preferred Location]" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Software Engineer (Rust or Go)",
  "description": "Snappycx is&nbsp;a leading company specializing in omnichannel customer support, committed to delivering top-quality customer experiences at affordable prices. With a team of passionate professionals dedicated to your product and brand, we utilize advanced metrics and tools to ensure maximum efficiency throughout the customer support journey.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Engineer (Rust or Go)

Job Location:&nbsp;Ibadan, Oyo
Job type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Description


	We have made a deliberate choice to build our entire backend in&nbsp;Rust(Go background can apply as well).
	We believe reliability, memory safety, and raw performance are not just features; they are our foundation. We are building a system that will be blazing fast, handle massive concurrency, and&nbsp;will not&nbsp;crash.
	This is a rare opportunity to be one of our first two engineers, architecting the entire backend from the ground up as part of a&nbsp;Go/Rust stack.


What You&#39;ll Be Doing


	Build the Core API:&nbsp;You will architect, build, and maintain our high-performance, memory-safe API using&nbsp;Rust/Go.
	Handle High Concurrency:&nbsp;This is the core of the job. You will use async/await and a modern framework (like&nbsp;axum,&nbsp;actix-web, or tokio) to handle thousands of simultaneous connections from our desktop clients flawlessly.
	Embrace &quot;Fearless Concurrency&quot;:&nbsp;You will write code that is free from data races and safe by default, ensuring our users&#39; time data is always processed with perfect integrity.
	Own the Database:&nbsp;You will design our&nbsp;PostgreSQL&nbsp;database schema and use a Rust-native library (like&nbsp;sqlx&nbsp;or&nbsp;sea-orm) to write efficient, type-safe queries.
	Manage Authentication &amp; Billing:&nbsp;You&#39;ll build the secure systems for user authentication and integrate with payment processors like Stripe.
	Collaborate &amp; Define:&nbsp;You will work directly with the founder and our frontend (Svelte/Tauri) engineer to define API contracts and shape the product&#39;s technical roadmap.


We&#39;re Looking for Someone Who


	Loves Go/Rust:&nbsp;You have&nbsp;professional or significant personal project experience&nbsp;in Go/Rust. You can show us code you&#39;ve written and are proud of.
	Understands Go/Rust&#39;s Core:&nbsp;You are comfortable with Go/Rust&#39;s key concepts.
	Is a Backend Generalist:&nbsp;You are a product-minded engineer who can take an idea, architect a solution, and build it, from the database to the API endpoint.
	Cares About Reliability:&nbsp;You&#39;re the kind of person who believes in the compiler and thinks that a bug is a failure of the type system, not just a mistake.


Bonus Points (We&#39;ll Be&nbsp;Really&nbsp;Excited If You):


	Have contributed to open-source Go/Rust projects or crates.
	Have strong experience with axum, sqlx, or sea-orm.
	You embrace AI tools such as Claude Code + Cursor.
	Have experience building and scaling high-concurrency, real-time systems.
	Have a strong opinion on Go/Rust&#39;s web framework ecosystem.


Why You&#39;ll Love Working With Us


	Use Rust. Every. Single. Day.&nbsp;This is not a side project. This is a 100% Rust-first company.
	Build a &quot;Pure Rust&quot; Stack:&nbsp;You&#39;ll be working on a Rust backend that communicates with a Rust-based Tauri desktop client. It&#39;s the stack you&#39;ve been dreaming of.
	Build From Scratch:&nbsp;No legacy code, no C++ bindings (unless you want to), no technical debt. You will build it&nbsp;right&nbsp;from day one.
	Solve a Hard, Rewarding Problem:&nbsp;High-concurrency is a perfect problem domain for Rust. You will get to use the language to its full potential.
	Massive Impact:&nbsp;You are not a cog in a machine. As a founding engineer, your work will define the technical foundation of the company for the next 10 years.
	Flexible &amp; Focused Team:&nbsp;We&#39;re a small, hybrid team based in Ibadan. No bureaucracy, no pointless meetings. Just building.
",

Software Engineer (Rust or Go) Job at SnappyCX




        
    

        
        Snappycx is a leading company specializing in omnichannel customer support, committed to delivering top-quality customer experiences at affordable prices. With a team of passionate professionals dedicated to your product and brand, we utilize advanced metrics and tools to ensure maximum efficiency throughout the customer support journey.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Software Engineer (Rust or Go)

Job Location: Ibadan, Oyo
Job type: Full-time (Hybrid)

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We have made a deliberate choice to build our entire backend in Rust(Go background can apply as well).
	We believe reliability, memory safety, and raw performance are not just features; they are our foundation. We are building a system that will be blazing fast, handle massive concurrency, and will not crash.
	This is a rare opportunity to be one of our first two engineers, architecting the entire backend from the ground up as part of a Go/Rust stack.


What You'll Be Doing


	Build the Core API: You will architect, build, and maintain our high-performance, memory-safe API using Rust/Go.
	Handle High Concurrency: This is the core of the job. You will use async/await and a modern framework (like axum, actix-web, or tokio) to handle thousands of simultaneous connections from our desktop clients flawlessly.
	Embrace "Fearless Concurrency": You will write code that is free from data races and safe by default, ensuring our users' time data is always processed with perfect integrity.
	Own the Database: You will design our PostgreSQL database schema and use a Rust-native library (like sqlx or sea-orm) to write efficient, type-safe queries.
	Manage Authentication & Billing: You'll build the secure systems for user authentication and integrate with payment processors like Stripe.
	Collaborate & Define: You will work directly with the founder and our frontend (Svelte/Tauri) engineer to define API contracts and shape the product's technical roadmap.


We're Looking for Someone Who


	Loves Go/Rust: You have professional or significant personal project experience in Go/Rust. You can show us code you've written and are proud of.
	Understands Go/Rust's Core: You are comfortable with Go/Rust's key concepts.
	Is a Backend Generalist: You are a product-minded engineer who can take an idea, architect a solution, and build it, from the database to the API endpoint.
	Cares About Reliability: You're the kind of person who believes in the compiler and thinks that a bug is a failure of the type system, not just a mistake.


Bonus Points (We'll Be Really Excited If You):


	Have contributed to open-source Go/Rust projects or crates.
	Have strong experience with axum, sqlx, or sea-orm.
	You embrace AI tools such as Claude Code + Cursor.
	Have experience building and scaling high-concurrency, real-time systems.
	Have a strong opinion on Go/Rust's web framework ecosystem.


Why You'll Love Working With Us


	Use Rust. Every. Single. Day. This is not a side project. This is a 100% Rust-first company.
	Build a "Pure Rust" Stack: You'll be working on a Rust backend that communicates with a Rust-based Tauri desktop client. It's the stack you've been dreaming of.
	Build From Scratch: No legacy code, no C++ bindings (unless you want to), no technical debt. You will build it right from day one.
	Solve a Hard, Rewarding Problem: High-concurrency is a perfect problem domain for Rust. You will get to use the language to its full potential.
	Massive Impact: You are not a cog in a machine. As a founding engineer, your work will define the technical foundation of the company for the next 10 years.
	Flexible & Focused Team: We're a small, hybrid team based in Ibadan. No bureaucracy, no pointless meetings. Just building.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
